creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
It’s not as expensive as it seems! 

We were surprised to see pastries like chocolate croissant wheel at only 25 AED! Drinks were at around 45 AED each.

We had pistachio croissant, alikreukel, and brisket croissant along with coffee and tea. We skipped the famous gold cappuccino which is a bit pricey. ☺️ The ambience is amazing! I particularly love the pink trees that made the golden surroundings more subtle and less intimidating. 

📍Episodes @mo_emiratespalace 

Save this for your next coffee date!
